summary: P1 Sprint 2: SmartStopSelector UI Testing Complete. All frontend features verified working: component renders correctly in EnhancedTickerModal sidebar, all 6 stop modes displayed with comparison data, recommendation fetched and displayed, mode selection updates UI, layered stops visualization shows 3 layers with 40/30/30 split, hunt risk colors correct (HIGH=red, MEDIUM=yellow, LOW=green).

minor.issue: IB Gateway returns 503 - expected when disconnected
Returns 404 when IB Gateway is offline

features_verified.SmartStopSelector_renders_in_modal: PASS - Component visible in EnhancedTickerModal sidebar
features_verified.mode_selection: PASS - Clicking modes updates selected stop in UI
features_verified.layered_stops_visualization: PASS - Shows 3 layers with 40/30/30 split at 1.0/1.5/2.0 ATR depths
features_verified.hunt_risk_colors: PASS - HIGH=red, MEDIUM=yellow, LOW=green displayed correctly
features_verified.recommendation_badge: PASS - Shows 'Rec: ATR DYNAMIC' badge in header
features_verified.recommendation_banner: PASS - Shows detailed recommendation with description
features_verified.stop_prices_displayed: PASS - Each mode shows Stop price, Risk %, Hunt Risk
features_verified.selected_stop_logic: PASS - Shows reasoning for selected mode

critical_code_review_comments: SmartStopSelector correctly uses REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL for API calls
All useEffect and useCallback hooks properly implemented with correct dependencies
Hunt risk color mapping complete for all 4 risk levels (HIGH, MEDIUM, LOW, LOW to MEDIUM)
LayeredStopsVisualizer correctly calculates stop prices based on entry, ATR, and direction
Mode selection properly propagates via onModeSelect callback to parent component
Error handling present for all API calls with console.error logging

success_rate.backend: 100% - All smart-stops APIs verified working via curl

mocked_apis.note: All APIs are real backend endpoints - no mocking

context_for_next_testing_agent: SmartStopSelector is integrated in EnhancedTickerModal and accessible by clicking tickers in the TickerTape (data-testid='ticker-tape-{SYMBOL}'). The modal opens from right side. SmartStopSelector is in the sidebar and can be expanded by clicking 'Smart Stop Protection'. All 6 modes (ORIGINAL, ATR DYNAMIC, ANTI HUNT, VOLATILITY ADJUSTED, LAYERED, CHANDELIER) are displayed with their stop prices, risk percentages, and hunt risk levels. When LAYERED mode is selected, the LayeredStopsVisualizer shows the 3-layer exit plan.
